dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4679 IS: To amend title 49, United States Code, to allow the introduction of certain noncompliant motor vehicle equipment in interstate commerce for testing purposes, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Peters (for himself and Mrs. Fischer) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation

form.official-title: To amend title 49, United States Code, to allow the introduction of certain noncompliant motor vehicle equipment in interstate commerce for testing purposes, and for other purposes.

section.header: Prohibitions on manufacturing, selling, and importing noncomplying motor vehicles and equipment

subsection.text: Section 30112(b)(10) of title 49, United States Code, is amended—

subparagraph.text: by inserting or an item of motor vehicle equipment after introduction of a motor vehicle; and
by inserting or item of motor vehicle equipment after the motor vehicle; and

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (A), by inserting or items of motor vehicle equipment after motor vehicles.
